name: Chicken Wings with Three Different Marinades
recipeInstructions:
For all three recipes: Cut each chicken wing in half and place them in a large resealable plastic bag. For one flavor, add the marinade ingredients and seal the bag. Turn the bag to ensure all wings are coated. Refrigerate up to 24 hours, preferably more than 4.
2. When ready to cook, drain the wings and discard the marinade. Place them on a broiler pan in an oven preheated to 375°F (190°C). Bake for 1 hour, basting every 15 minutes with the reserved marinade until the chicken is no longer pink.
3. Serve warm. Makes 24 servings.
